flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Western Technical College fell 36% between 2023 and 2024 (68.4% → 43.6%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Western Technical College rose 23% between 2017 and 2020 ($14.0k → $17.3k).

flags.label: For-profit certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Western Technical College are 44% above the for-profit certificate-predominant peer median ($36.2k vs $25.2k).
